name: foreman-company-builder
description: Foreman Company Builder — the dispatch and verification runtime for AI agent companies

scripts.test: bash tests/smoke/qa-role.sh && bash tests/smoke/launch-phase.sh && bash tests/smoke/qa-gate-failure.sh && bash tests/smoke/foreman-wrapper-dispatch.sh && bash tests/smoke/dispatch-dryrun.sh && bash tests/smoke/dispatch-provider-fallback.sh && bash tests/smoke/dispatch-verdict-parsing.sh && bash tests/smoke/issues-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/nobrain-onboarding.sh && bash tests/smoke/init-capability-probe.sh && bash tests/smoke/press-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/press-invalid-manifest.sh && bash tests/smoke/press-propose-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/lph-cli-smoke.sh && bash tests/smoke/run-lifecycle.sh && bash tests/smoke/run-escalation.sh && bash tests/smoke/run-invalid-transitions.sh && TMP_LEDGER=$(mktemp) && echo '{"schema_version":"foreman.runs.v0","next_id":1,"runs":[]}' > "$TMP_LEDGER" && python3 tests/json/validate-run-ledger.py "$TMP_LEDGER" && rm -f "$TMP_LEDGER" && python3 tests/json/validate-module-manifests.py modules && python3 tests/json/validate-department-primitives.py modules/departments && python3 tests/json/validate-department-catalog.py && python3 tests/json/validate-company-composition.py
